projectDescription: A collection of templates and best practices for creating comprehensive software documentation.
keyFeatures: Ready-to-use templates for API documentation (Overview, Quickstart, Reference, Setup)
Meta-template for creating new documentation templates
Best practices and examples from industry-leading documentation
publicApiSurface: Overview template - explains what the product does and doesn't do
Quickstart template - step-by-step guide to get started quickly
Reference template - exhaustive API endpoint documentation
Setup template - installation and configuration guide
Administration template - guide for system administrators
User Guide template - comprehensive end-user documentation
Integrations template - plugin and integration documentation
Meta-template - framework for creating new templates
